narration: The ground beneath you is slowly sliding on giant tectonic plates.

narration: These plates form Earth's lithosphere, floating on molten rock. Can you feel it moving?

narration: Mid-ocean ridges pull plates apart, while subduction zones push them down. Imagine the pressure!
